---
title: "Somalia BAB Endline Report Teacher Data Build"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %Y')`"
output: 
  word_document:
    reference_docx: word-styles-reference-01.docx
    toc: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
## Condensed graphics version

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE, message=FALSE, comment=NA)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(officer)
library(flextable)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(HH)
library(psych)

#Set significant digits
sigdig <- 2
sigdig2 <- 1
sigdig3 <- 0
sigdig4 <- 4

#Trim and decimal functions
trim <- function (x) gsub("^\\s+|\\s+$", "", x)
specify_decimal <- function(x, k) trimws(format(round(x, k), nsmall=k))
```

```{r read data files}
## Set Working directory to grab baseline files
setwd("C:/Users/besse/My Files/Somalia/Baseline/Longitudinal-SORDI-Laser")
##setwd("A:/ELRC/Data Team SHARED/Data Report Templates/Somalia/Baseline/Longitudinal-SORDI-Laser")

## read in data files
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- read.csv('./BTeacherSurveyLong.csv')
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate<- read.csv('./BHeadTeacherSurveyLong.csv')

## Set Working directory to grab midline files
setwd("C:/Users/besse/My Files/Somalia/Midline/Longitudinal-SORDI-Laser")
Mteachersurveylonglocate <- read.csv('./MidlineTeacherSurveyLong.csv')
Mheadteachersurveylonglocate <- read.csv('./MidlineHeadTeacherSurveyLong.csv')

## set working directory to grab baseline level 2 EGRA and EGMA file
setwd("C:/Users/besse/My Files/Somalia/BaselineLevel2")

## set working directory to grab endline level 2 student survey data
setwd("C:/Users/besse/My Files/Somalia/Endline/Longitudinal/")
EL2teachersurveylonglocate <- read.csv('./EL2TeacherSurveyLong.csv')
EL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- read.csv('./EL2HeadTeacherSurveyLong.csv')
```

```{r adjust baseline teacher scales to start at 0}
## readjust scale items to begin at 0 instead of 1
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTInstrSE_01_n = BTInstrSE_01 - 1) 
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTInstrSE_02_n = BTInstrSE_02 - 1)
```

```{r create midline teacher numeric variables}
Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTStdntRtntnNtrlDsstrsWho_n <- sapply(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTStdntRtntnNtrlDsstrsWho, as.numeric)

Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_01_n <- sapply(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_01_n, as.numeric)
Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_02_n <- sapply(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_02_n, as.numeric)
Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_03_n <- sapply(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_03_n, as.numeric)
Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_04_n <- sapply(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_04_n, as.numeric)
Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_05_n <- sapply(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_05_n, as.numeric)
Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_06_n <- sapply(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTSatisNTPS_06_n, as.numeric)

Mteachersurveylonglocate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MTSatisNTPS_01CNV_n = round(MTSatisNTPS_01_n * 5/6, 2))
Mteachersurveylonglocate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MTSatisNTPS_02CNV_n = round(MTSatisNTPS_02_n * 5/6, 2))
Mteachersurveylonglocate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MTSatisNTPS_03CNV_n = round(MTSatisNTPS_03_n * 5/6, 2))
Mteachersurveylonglocate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MTSatisNTPS_04CNV_n = round(MTSatisNTPS_04_n * 5/6, 2))
Mteachersurveylonglocate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MTSatisNTPS_05CNV_n = round(MTSatisNTPS_05_n * 5/6, 2))
Mteachersurveylonglocate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MTSatisNTPS_06CNV_n = round(MTSatisNTPS_06_n * 5/6, 2))
Mteachersurveylonglocate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MTSatisNTPS_07CNV_n = round(MTSatisNTPS_07_n * 5/6, 2))
```

```{r create midline head teacher numeric variables}
Mheadteachersurveylonglocate$MHTBABProgram_n <- sapply(Mheadteachersurveylonglocate$MHTBABProgram, as.numeric)
```

```{r create baseline teacher new factor variables}
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTeacherAgeGroup1 = case_when(
    BTeacherAge < 30  ~ 'Under 30 Year Olds',
    BTeacherAge < 40  ~ '30 - 40 Year Olds',
    BTeacherAge < 80 ~ '40 - 65 Year Olds'
))

Bheadteachersurveylonglocate <- Bheadteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BHTeacherAgeGroup1 = case_when(
    BHTeacherAge < 30  ~ 'Under 30 Year Olds',
    BHTeacherAge < 40  ~ '30 - 40 Year Olds',
    BHTeacherAge < 80 ~ '40 - 65 Year Olds'
))

Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachSizeGroup = case_when(
    BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachSize < 26 ~ 'Under 26 Students',
    BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachSize < 51 ~ 'Between 26 and 50 Students',
    BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachSize < 76 ~ 'Between 41 and 75 Students',
    BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachSize < 100 ~ 'Between 76 and 100 Students',
    BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachSize < 300 ~ 'More than 100 Students'
))

Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTBABClassTeachSizeGroup = case_when(
    BTBABClassTeachSize < 26 ~ 'Under 26 Students',
    BTBABClassTeachSize < 51 ~ 'Between 26 and 50 Students',
    BTBABClassTeachSize < 76 ~ 'Between 51 and 75 Students',
    BTBABClassTeachSize < 100 ~ 'Between 76 and 100 Students',
    BTBABClassTeachSize < 300 ~ 'More than 100 Students'
))

Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTBABProgram2_f = case_when(
    BTBABProgram_n == 3 ~ 'Formal Primary Only',
    BTBABProgram_n == 2 ~ 'BAB Only',
    BTBABProgram_n == 1 ~ 'Both BAB\nand Formal Primary'
))

Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTColocation_f = case_when(
    Colocated == 'Yes' ~ 'Colocated Site',
    Colocated == 'No' ~ 'BAB Center'
))

Bheadteachersurveylonglocate <- Bheadteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BHTColocation_f = case_when(
    Colocated == 'Yes' ~ 'Colocated Site',
    Colocated == 'No' ~ 'BAB Center'
))

Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeacherAgeGroup1_f <- sapply(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeacherAgeGroup1, as.factor)
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachSizeGroup_f <- sapply(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachSizeGroup, as.factor)
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABClassTeachSizeGroup_f <- sapply(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABClassTeachSizeGroup, as.factor)
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABProgram2_f <- sapply(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABProgram2_f, as.factor)
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTColocation_f <- sapply(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTColocation_f, as.factor)
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BTColocation_f <- sapply(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTColocation_f, as.factor)
```

```{r set baseline teacher factor levels}
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTLocationType_f <- fct_relevel(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTLocationType_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFundingType_f <- fct_relevel(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFundingType_f, "BAB", "Community", "Public", "Private")
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeacherAgeGroup1_f <- fct_relevel(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeacherAgeGroup1_f, "Under 30 Year Olds", "30 - 40 Year Olds", "40 - 65 Year Olds")
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABProgram_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABProgram_f, levels = c('1', '2', '3'), labels = c('Both BAB and Formal Primary', 'BAB Only', 'Formal Primary Only'))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTState_f <- fct_relevel(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTState_f, "Benaadir", "Hirshabeelle", "Jubbaland", "South-West")
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTGender_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTGender_f, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('male', 'female'))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABSchoolShift_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABSchoolShift, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4', '99'), labels = c('Morning', 'Afternoon', 'Noon', 'Other', 'NA'))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFormalPrimarySchoolShift_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFormalPrimarySchoolShift, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4', '99'), labels = c('Morning', 'Afternoon', 'Noon', 'Other', 'NA'))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeacherEducation_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeacherEducation_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6'), labels = c("Less than Grade 12", "Grade 12 graduate", "Grade 14 graduate", "Bachelor's Degree", "Master's Degree", "Doctorate Degree", "Other please specify")) 
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeacherExpLength_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeacherExpLength_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6'), labels = c("Less than 1 year", "1 year", "2 years", "3 years", "4 years", "5 years", "More than 5 years" )) 
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_01_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_01_f, levels = c('0', '1' ), labels = c("No", "Yes" )) 
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_02_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_02_f, levels = c('0', '1' ), labels = c("No", "Yes" ))  
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_03_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_03_f, levels = c('0', '1' ), labels = c("No", "Yes" ))  
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_04_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_04_f, levels = c('0', '1' ), labels = c("No", "Yes" ))  
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_99_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_99_f, levels = c('0', '1' ), labels = c("No", "Yes" ))  
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_888_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTeachReason_888_f, levels = c('0', '1' ), labels = c("No", "Yes" ))  
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTHaveOtherOccupation_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTHaveOtherOccupation_f, levels = c('0', '1' ), labels = c("No", "Yes" )) 
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTOtherOccupation_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTOtherOccupation_f, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '888' ), labels = c("Farming", "Running a store", "Driving", "Teaching at private schools and courses", "Being an Imam", "Raising animals", "Any other job", "Did not Answer" )) 
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFormalPrimaryLevelTeach_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFormalPrimaryLevelTeach_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4','5', '6', '7'), labels = c("I do not teach any Formal Primary classes", "Early childhood education", "1st BGrade", "2nd BGrade", "3rd BGrade", "4th BGrade", "5th BGrade", "Above BGrade 5")) 
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachPerm_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachPerm_f, levels = c('0', '1'), labels = c("No", "Yes")) 
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABLevelTeach_f <- factor(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTBABLevelTeach_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3'), labels = c("None", "BAB Level 1", "BAB Level 2", "Both BAB Level 1 & 2"))
```

```{r set midline teacher factor levels}
Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTLocationType_f <- fct_relevel(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTLocationType_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")
```

```{r set endline teacher factor levels}
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TLocationType_f <- fct_relevel(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TLocationType_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TFundingType_f <- fct_relevel(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TFundingType_f, "BAB", "Community", "Public", "Private")
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f <- fct_relevel(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f, "Under 30 Year Olds", "30 - 40 Year Olds", "40 - 65 Year Olds")
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABProgram_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABProgram_f, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('Both BAB and Formal Primary', 'BAB Only'))
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TState_f <- fct_relevel(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TState_f, "Benaadir", "Hirshabeelle", "Jubbaland", "South-West")
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TGender_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TGender_f, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('male', 'female'))
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABSchoolShift_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABSchoolShift, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4', '99'), labels = c('Morning', 'Afternoon', 'Noon', 'Other', 'NA'))
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TFormalPrimarySchoolShift_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TFormalPrimarySchoolShift, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4', '99'), labels = c('Morning', 'Afternoon', 'Noon', 'Other', 'NA'))
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TeacherEducation_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TeacherEducation_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6'), labels = c("Less than Grade 12", "Grade 12 graduate", "Grade 14 graduate", "Bachelor's Degree", "Master's Degree", "Doctorate Degree", "Other")) 
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2THaveOtherOccupation_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2THaveOtherOccupation_f, levels = c('0', '1' ), labels = c("No", "Yes" )) 
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TOtherOccupation_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TOtherOccupation_f, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '888' ), labels = c("Farming", "Running a store", "Driving", "Teaching at private schools and courses", "Being an Imam", "Raising animals", "Any other job", "Did not Answer" )) 
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TFormalPrimaryLevelTeach_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TFormalPrimaryLevelTeach_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4','5', '6', '7'), labels = c("I do not teach any Formal Primary classes", "Early childhood education", "1st Grade", "2nd Grade", "3rd Grade", "4th Grade", "5th Grade", "Above Grade 5")) 
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TFormalPrimaryClassTeachPerm_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TFormalPrimaryClassTeachPerm_f, levels = c('0', '1'), labels = c("No", "Yes")) 
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABLevelTeach_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABLevelTeach_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3'), labels = c("None", "BAB Level 1", "BAB Level 2", "Both BAB Level 1 & 2")) 
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABClassTeachPerm_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABClassTeachPerm_f, levels = c('0', '1'), labels = c("No", "Yes")) 
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TeacherLanguage_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TeacherLanguage_f, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '8', '9'), labels = c("Maay", "Maxaa tiri", "Dabarre", "Garre", "Barwaani", "Jiida", "Tunni", "Baajuun", "Another Language" )) 
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TLanguageTeach_f <- factor(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TLanguageTeach_f, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4'), labels = c("Maay", "Maxaa tiri", "Both Maay and Maxaa tiri", "Other Language"))
```

```{r set baseline head teacher factor levels}
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTLocationType_f <- fct_relevel(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTLocationType_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTFormalPrimaryFundingType_f <- fct_relevel(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTFormalPrimaryFundingType_f, "Community", "Public", "Private")
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f <- sapply(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTeacherAgeGroup1, as.factor)
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f <- fct_relevel(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f, "Under 30 Year Olds", "30 - 40 Year Olds", "40 - 65 Year Olds")
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTState_f <- fct_relevel(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTState_f, "Benaadir", "Hirshabeelle", "Jubbaland", "South-West")
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTGender_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTGender_f, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('male', 'female'))
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTBABSchoolShift_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTBABSchoolShift, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4', '5'), labels = c('Morning', 'Afternoon', 'Noon', 'Other', 'NA'))
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTFormalPrimarySchoolShift_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTFormalPrimarySchoolShift, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '4', '5'), labels = c('Morning', 'Afternoon', 'Noon', 'Other', 'NA'))
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTeacherEducation_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTeacherEducation_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6'), labels = c("Less than Grade 12", "Grade 12 graduate", "Grade 14 graduate", "Bachelor's Degree",  "Master's Degree", "Doctorate Degree", "Other please specify")) 
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTeacherExpLength_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTeacherExpLength_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6'), labels = c("Less than 1 year", "1 year", "2 years", "3 years", "4 years", "5 years", "More than 5 years" )) 
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTTaughtClassroom_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTTaughtClassroom_f, levels = c('0', '1'), labels = c('No', 'Yes'))
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTMgmtTraining_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTMgmtTraining_f, levels = c('0', '1'), labels = c('No', 'Yes'))

Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTTrainChildRights_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTTrainChildRights, levels = c('0', '1'), labels = c('No', 'Yes'))
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTTrainChildRightsNum_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTTrainChildRightsNum_f, levels = c('1', '2', '3', '99'), labels = c('One training', 'Two trainings', 'More than two', "I don't know"))
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTFormalPrimaryClassClosed_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTFormalPrimaryClassClosed_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '99'), labels = c( 'No', 'One day', 'Two to five days', 'One to two weeks', 'Two to four weeks', 'More than a month', "NA"))
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTBABClassClosed_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTBABClassClosed_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '99'), labels = c( 'No', 'One day', 'Two to five days', 'One to two weeks', 'Two to four weeks', 'More than a month', "NA"))
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTBABSchoolDisabledStudents_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTBABSchoolDisabledStudents_f, levels=c('0', '1', '99'), labels=c("No", "Yes", "I don't know"))
Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTFormalPrimarySchoolDisabledStudents_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTFormalPrimarySchoolDisabledStudents_f, levels=c('0', '1', '99'), labels=c("No", "Yes", "I don't know"))

Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTSupport_02_f <- factor(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTSupport_02_f, levels=c('0', '1', '99'), labels=c("No", "Yes", "NA"))
```

```{r create midline head teacher factor levels}
Mheadteachersurveylonglocate$MHTeacherAgeGroup1_f <- fct_relevel(Mheadteachersurveylonglocate$MHTeacherAgeGroup1_f, "Under 30 Year Olds", "30 - 40 Year Olds", "40 - 65 Year Olds")
```

```{r create baseline teacher scale items}
BTeacherSafetyScaleList <- c('BTSafety_01_n', 'BTSafety_02_n', 'BTSafety_04_n', 'BTSafety_06_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTSafetyScale = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTeacherSafetyScaleList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSafetyScale <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSafetyScale, 2)

BTSupportIntDimList <- c('BTSupport_01_n', 'BTSupport_02_n', 'BTSupport_05_n', 'BTSupport_07_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTSupportIntDim = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTSupportIntDimList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSupportIntDim <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSupportIntDim, 2)

BTSupportExtDimList <- c('BTSupport_03_n', 'BTSupport_04_n', 'BTSupport_06_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTSupportExtDim = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTSupportExtDimList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSupportExtDim <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSupportExtDim, 2)

BTSupportScaleList <- c('BTSupport_01_n', 'BTSupport_02_n', 'BTSupport_03_n', 'BTSupport_04_n', 'BTSupport_05_n', 'BTSupport_06_n', 'BTSupport_07_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate<- Bteachersurveylonglocate%>% mutate(BTSupportScale = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTSupportScaleList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSupportScale <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSupportScale, 2)

BTEmotionalEngagementDimList <- c('BTEmotionalEngagement_01_n', 'BTEmotionalEngagement_02_n', 'BTEmotionalEngagement_03_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTEmotionalEngagementDim = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTEmotionalEngagementDimList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTEmotionalEngagementDim <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTEmotionalEngagementDim, 2)

BTSocialEngagementDimList <- c('BTSocialEngagement_01_n', 'BTSocialEngagement_02_n', 'BTSocialEngagement_04_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate%>% mutate(BTSocialEngagementDim = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTSocialEngagementDimList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSocialEngagementDim <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSocialEngagementDim, 2)

BTCognitiveEngagementDimList <- c('BTCognitiveEngagement_01_n', 'BTCognitiveEngagement_02_n', 'BTCognitiveEngagement_03_n', 'BTCognitiveEngagement_04_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTCognitiveEngagementDim = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTCognitiveEngagementDimList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTCognitiveEngagementDim <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTCognitiveEngagementDim, 2)

BTEngagementScaleList <- c('BTEmotionalEngagement_01_n', 'BTEmotionalEngagement_02_n', 'BTEmotionalEngagement_03_n', 'BTSocialEngagement_01_n', 'BTSocialEngagement_02_n', 'BTSocialEngagement_04_n', 'BTCognitiveEngagement_01_n', 'BTCognitiveEngagement_02_n', 'BTCognitiveEngagement_03_n', 'BTCognitiveEngagement_04_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTEngagementScale = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTEngagementScaleList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTEngagementScale <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTEngagementScale, 2)

BTInstrSEDimList <- c('BTInstrSE_02_n', 'BTInstrSE_03_n', 'BTInstrSE_05_n', 'BTInstrSE_06_n', 'BTInstrSE_07_n', 'BTInstrSE_09_n', 'BTInstrSE_10_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTInstrSEDim = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTInstrSEDimList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTInstrSEDim <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTInstrSEDim, 2)

BTDiscSEDimList <- c('BTDiscSE_01_n', 'BTDiscSE_02_n', 'BTDiscSE_03_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate%>% mutate(BTDiscSEDim = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTDiscSEDimList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTDiscSEDim <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTDiscSEDim, 2)

BTSEScaleList <- c('BTInstrSE_02_n', 'BTInstrSE_03_n', 'BTInstrSE_05_n', 'BTInstrSE_06_n', 'BTInstrSE_07_n', 'BTInstrSE_09_n', 'BTInstrSE_10_n', 'BTDiscSE_01_n', 'BTDiscSE_02_n', 'BTDiscSE_03_n')
Bteachersurveylonglocate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BTSEScale = rowMeans(Bteachersurveylonglocate[BTSEScaleList], na.rm = TRUE))
Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSEScale <- round(Bteachersurveylonglocate$BTSEScale, 2)
```

```{r create midline teacher scale items}
Mteachersurveylonglocate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MTSupportInt_LKRT = case_when(
MTSupportIntDim <= 0.5 ~ "Very Untrue",
MTSupportIntDim <= 1.5 ~ "Untrue",
MTSupportIntDim <= 2.5 ~ "Somewhat Untrue",
MTSupportIntDim <= 3.5 ~ "Neutral",
MTSupportIntDim <= 4.5 ~ "Somewhat true",
MTSupportIntDim <= 5.5 ~ "True",

MTCognitiveEngagementDimCNVAlpha <- psych::alpha(Mteachersurveylonglocate[MTCognitiveEngagementDimCNVList], na.rm = TRUE)

Mteachersurveylonglocate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MTCognitiveEngagementCNV_LKRT = case_when(
MTCognitiveEngagementDimCNV <= 0.415 ~ "Never",
MTCognitiveEngagementDimCNV <= 0.83 ~ "Rarely",
MTCognitiveEngagementDimCNV <= 1.67 ~ "On Occasion",
MTCognitiveEngagementDimCNV <= 2.49 ~ "Sometimes",
MTCognitiveEngagementDimCNV <= 3.32 ~ "Often",
MTCognitiveEngagementDimCNV <= 4.17 ~ "Frequently",
MTCognitiveEngagementDimCNV <= 5.0 ~ "Always"))

Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTCognitiveEngagementCNV_LKRT <- sapply(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTCognitiveEngagementCNV_LKRT, as.factor)

Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTCognitiveEngagementCNV_LKRT <- fct_relevel(Mteachersurveylonglocate$MTCognitiveEngagementCNV_LKRT, "Never", "Rarely", "On Occasion", "Sometimes", "Often", "frequently", "Always")
```

```{r create endline teacher scale items}
TeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =38, ncol = 3))
colnames(TeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf) <- c('Scale', 'Raw Alpha', 'Std Alpha')
rowstart <- 1

EL2TInstrSEScaleList <- c('EL2TInstrSE_01_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_02_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_03_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_04_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_05_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_06_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_07_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_09_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_10_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_11_n')
EL2teachersurveylonglocate <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2TInstrSEScale = rowMeans(EL2teachersurveylonglocate[EL2TInstrSEScaleList], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSEScale <- round(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSEScale, 2)
EL2TInstrSEScaleAlpha <- psych::alpha(EL2teachersurveylonglocate[EL2TInstrSEScaleList], na.rm = TRUE)

TeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$Scale[rowstart] <- 'Teacher Instructional Self-Efficacy Scale'
TeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Raw Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2TInstrSEScaleAlpha$total$raw_alpha
TeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Std Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2TInstrSEScaleAlpha$total$std.alpha
rowstart <- rowstart + 1

EL2teachersurveylonglocate <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2TInstrSE_LKRT = case_when(
EL2TInstrSEScale <= 0.5 ~ "Nothing",
EL2TInstrSEScale <= 1.5 ~ "Very little",
EL2TInstrSEScale <= 2.5 ~ "Some influence",
EL2TInstrSEScale <= 3.5 ~ "Quite a bit",
EL2TInstrSEScale <= 4.0 ~ "A great deal"))

EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSE_LKRT <- sapply(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSE_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSE_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSE_LKRT, "Nothing", "Very little", "Some influence", "Quite a bit", "A great deal")



EL2TInstrSEScaleCNVList <- c('EL2TInstrSE_01CNV_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_02CNV_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_03CNV_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_04CNV_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_05CNV_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_06CNV_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_07CNV_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_09CNV_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_10CNV_n', 'EL2TInstrSE_11CNV_n')
EL2teachersurveylonglocate <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2TInstrSEScaleCNV = rowMeans(EL2teachersurveylonglocate[EL2TInstrSEScaleCNVList], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSEScaleCNV <- round(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSEScaleCNV, 2)
EL2TInstrSEScaleCNVAlpha <- psych::alpha(EL2teachersurveylonglocate[EL2TInstrSEScaleCNVList], na.rm = TRUE)

TeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$Scale[rowstart] <- 'Teacher Instructional Self-Efficacy Scale Converted'
TeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Raw Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2TInstrSEScaleCNVAlpha$total$raw_alpha
TeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Std Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2TInstrSEScaleCNVAlpha$total$std.alpha
rowstart <- rowstart + 1

EL2teachersurveylonglocate <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2TInstrSECNV_LKRT = case_when(
EL2TInstrSEScaleCNV <= 0.625 ~ "Nothing",
EL2TInstrSEScaleCNV <= 1.875 ~ "Very little",
EL2TInstrSEScaleCNV <= 3.125 ~ "Some influence",
EL2TInstrSEScaleCNV <= 4.375 ~ "Quite a bit",
EL2TInstrSEScaleCNV <= 5.0 ~ "A great deal"))

EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSECNV_LKRT <- sapply(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSECNV_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSECNV_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TInstrSECNV_LKRT, "Nothing", "Very little", "Some influence", "Quite a bit", "A great deal")



EL2TParentalScaleList <- c('EL2TParental_01_n', 'EL2TParental_02_n', 'EL2TParental_03_n')
EL2teachersurveylonglocate <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2TParentalScale = rowMeans(EL2teachersurveylonglocate[EL2TParentalScaleList], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TParentalScale <- round(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TParentalScale, 2)

EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TParentalScaleCNV <- round(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TParentalScaleCNV, 2)

rowstart <- rowstart + 1

EL2TParentalScaleCNV <= 0.625 ~ "Nothing",
EL2TParentalScaleCNV <= 1.875 ~ "Very little",
EL2TParentalScaleCNV <= 3.125 ~ "Some influence",
EL2TParentalScaleCNV <= 4.375 ~ "Quite a bit",

rowstart <- rowstart + 1

EL2teachersurveylonglocate <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2TEquity_LKRT = case_when(
EL2TEquityScale <= 0.5 ~ "Very Untrue",
EL2TEquityScale <= 1.5 ~ "Untrue",
EL2TEquityScale <= 2.5 ~ "Somewhat Untrue",
EL2TEquityScale <= 3.5 ~ "Neutral",
EL2TEquityScale <= 4.5 ~ "Somewhat true",
EL2TEquityScale <= 5.5 ~ "True",
EL2TEquityScale <= 6.0 ~ "Very True"))

EL2TSatisNTPSScaleList <- c('EL2TSatisNTPS_01_n', 'EL2TSatisNTPS_02_n', 'EL2TSatisNTPS_03_n', 'EL2TSatisNTPS_04_n', 'EL2TSatisNTPS_05_n', 'EL2TSatisNTPS_07_n')

EL2TSatisNTPSScale <= 0.5 ~ "Strongly Disagree",

EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TSatisNTPS_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TSatisNTPS_LKRT, "Strongly Disagree", "Disagree", "Somewhat Disagree", "Neither Agree nor Disagree", "Somewhat Agree", "Agree", "Strongly Agree")

## Item EL2TSatisNTPS_06CNV was removed from the scale.  It was a negatively worded item and didn't conform as well to the other items nor did it stick out as being opposite from the other items so it could be reversed.

rowstart <- rowstart + 1

EL2TSatisNTPSScaleCNV <= 0.415 ~ "Strongly Disagree",
```

```{r create endline head teacher scale items}
HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =22, ncol = 3))
colnames(HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf) <- c('Scale', 'Raw Alpha', 'Std Alpha')
rowstart <- 1

EL2HTParentalScaleList <- c('EL2HTParental_01_n', 'EL2HTParental_02_n', 'EL2HTParental_03_n')
EL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2HTParentalScale = rowMeans(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate[EL2HTParentalScaleList], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParentalScale <- round(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParentalScale, 2)
EL2HTParentalScaleAlpha <- psych::alpha(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate[EL2HTParentalScaleList], na.rm = TRUE)

HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$Scale[rowstart] <- 'Head Teacher Parental Scale'
HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Raw Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2HTParentalScaleAlpha$total$raw_alpha
HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Std Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2HTParentalScaleAlpha$total$std.alpha
rowstart <- rowstart + 1

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2HTParental_LKRT = case_when(
EL2HTParentalScale <= 0.5 ~ "Nothing",
EL2HTParentalScale <= 1.5 ~ "Very little",
EL2HTParentalScale <= 2.5 ~ "Some influence",
EL2HTParentalScale <= 3.5 ~ "Quite a bit",
EL2HTParentalScale <= 4.0 ~ "A great deal"))

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParental_LKRT <- sapply(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParental_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParental_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParental_LKRT, "Nothing", "Very little", "Some influence", "Quite a bit", "A great deal")



EL2HTParentalScaleCNVList <- c('EL2HTParental_01CNV_n', 'EL2HTParental_02CNV_n', 'EL2HTParental_03CNV_n')
EL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2HTParentalScaleCNV = rowMeans(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate[EL2HTParentalScaleCNVList], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParentalScaleCNV <- round(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParentalScaleCNV, 2)
EL2HTParentalScaleCNVAlpha <- psych::alpha(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate[EL2HTParentalScaleCNVList], na.rm = TRUE)

HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$Scale[rowstart] <- 'Head Teacher Parental Scale Converted'
HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Raw Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2HTParentalScaleCNVAlpha$total$raw_alpha
HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Std Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2HTParentalScaleCNVAlpha$total$std.alpha
rowstart <- rowstart + 1

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2HTParentalCNV_LKRT = case_when(
EL2HTParentalScaleCNV <= 0.625 ~ "Nothing",
EL2HTParentalScaleCNV <= 1.875 ~ "Very little",
EL2HTParentalScaleCNV <= 3.125 ~ "Some influence",
EL2HTParentalScaleCNV <= 4.375 ~ "Quite a bit",
EL2HTParentalScaleCNV <= 5.0 ~ "A great deal"))

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParentalCNV_LKRT <- sapply(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParentalCNV_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParentalCNV_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTParentalCNV_LKRT, "Nothing", "Very little", "Some influence", "Quite a bit", "A great deal")



EL2HTPosSchlClimateScaleList <- c('EL2HTPosSchlClimate_01_n', 'EL2HTPosSchlClimate_02_n', 'EL2HTPosSchlClimate_03_n', 'EL2HTPosSchlClimate_04_n', 'EL2HTPosSchlClimate_05_n', 'EL2HTPosSchlClimate_06_n', 'EL2HTPosSchlClimate_07_n', 'EL2HTPosSchlClimate_08_n')
EL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2HTPosSchlClimateScale = rowMeans(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate[EL2HTPosSchlClimateScaleList], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTPosSchlClimateScale <- round(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTPosSchlClimateScale, 2)
EL2HTPosSchlClimateScaleAlpha <- psych::alpha(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate[EL2HTPosSchlClimateScaleList], na.rm = TRUE)

EL2HTPosSchlClimateScale <= 2.5 ~ "Some influence",
EL2HTPosSchlClimateScale <= 3.5 ~ "Quite a bit",

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2HTStudentHope_LKRT = case_when(
EL2HTStudentHopeScale <= 0.5 ~ "none of the time",
EL2HTStudentHopeScale <= 1.5 ~ "a little of the time",
EL2HTStudentHopeScale <= 2.5 ~ "some of the time",
EL2HTStudentHopeScale <= 3.5 ~ "a lot of the time",
EL2HTStudentHopeScale <= 4.5 ~ "most of the time",
EL2HTStudentHopeScale <= 5.0 ~ "all of the time"))

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTStudentHope_LKRT <- sapply(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTStudentHope_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTStudentHope_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTStudentHope_LKRT, "none of the time", "a little of the time", "some of the time", "a lot of the time", "most of the time", "all of the time")



EL2HTTrainingScaleList <- c('EL2HTTraining_01_n', 'EL2HTTraining_02_n', 'EL2HTTraining_03_n', 'EL2HTTraining_04_n', 'EL2HTTraining_05_n', 'EL2HTTraining_06_n', 'EL2HTTraining_07_n')
EL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2HTTrainingScale = rowMeans(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate[EL2HTTrainingScaleList], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTTrainingScale <- round(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTTrainingScale, 2)
EL2HTTrainingScaleAlpha <- psych::alpha(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate[EL2HTTrainingScaleList], na.rm = TRUE)

HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Raw Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2HTTrainingScaleAlpha$total$raw_alpha
HeadTeacherScaleAlphaScoresdf$`Std Alpha`[rowstart] <- EL2HTTrainingScaleAlpha$total$std.alpha
rowstart <- rowstart + 1

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2HTTraining_LKRT = case_when(
EL2HTTrainingScale <= 0.5 ~ "Strongly Disagree",
EL2HTTrainingScale <= 1.5 ~ "Disagree",
EL2HTTrainingScale <= 2.5 ~ "Somewhat Disagree",
EL2HTTrainingScale <= 3.5 ~ "Neither Agree nor Disagree",
EL2HTTrainingScale <= 4.5 ~ "Somewhat Agree",
EL2HTTrainingScale <= 5.5 ~ "Agree",
EL2HTTrainingScale <= 6   ~ "Strongly Agree"))

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTTraining_LKRT <- sapply(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTTraining_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTTraining_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTTraining_LKRT, "Strongly Disagree", "Disagree", "Somewhat Disagree", "Neither Agree nor Disagree", "Somewhat Agree", "Agree", "Strongly Agree")

EL2HTTrainingScaleCNV <= 0.415 ~ "Strongly Disagree",

EL2HTTrainingScaleCNV <= 1.67 ~ "Somewhat Disagree",
EL2HTTrainingScaleCNV <= 2.49 ~ "Neither Agree nor Disagree",

EL2HTTrainingScaleCNV <= 5  ~ "Strongly Agree"))
```
